initial_draft:
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> I have no resources to trade, so I cannot accept the proposal. I must reject it to avoid losing all resources. </reason>
<player answer> REJECT </player answer>
<message> I cannot accept the trade as I have no resources to offer. I must reject. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: The response contains all required tags in the correct order, and the content is valid. No missing or malformed tags detected.

2. Payoff alignment: OK. Since Player BLUE has no resources, there is no payoff to consider in this case. The only possible action is to reject the trade.

3. Opponent plausibility: OK. Player BLUE has no resources and cannot accept the trade, so rejecting it is the only plausible action.

4. Consistency: OK. The <reason>, <player answer>, and <message> are all consistent with each other. There is no contradiction.

5. Rule compliance: OK. The response respects the rules, including the fact that Player BLUE cannot propose on Move 4/4 and must only accept or reject. In this case, rejection is the only valid move.
</critique>
